reviews.review_description: EchoDrift is a fun and promising VR racing experience focused on drifting. With multiple tracks, progression systems, and flexible controls, it offers enjoyable gameplay for racing fans. A solid foundation with great potential. Fun to play, with good ideas, it has everything to appeal to racing enthusiasts looking for a simple and effective experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review, together all the reviews help to make the game better

reviews.review_description: Love the hover car spin on it, it took me a bit to get used to steering it mainly because I don’t play a lot of vr racing games but this one is awesome! Great music to race to, multiple camera angles, fun tracks  and hitting those drifts just right👌 I can’t wait to see what’s coming next for this game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review and yes lots more planned to come, with new Cups,Cars and the multiplayer, if you have a great idea to add then pop into the discord and lets chat there

reviews.review_description:
Echo Drift is merciless and a masterclass in VR racing—packed with depth, challenge, and that unmistakable Mad Max dystopian vibe. The progression system (win races → upgrade your car) is brilliantly addictive, turning "impossible" tracks into conquerable thrills. The AI is ruthless—no free wins here, just pure, high-stakes racing.
The universe feels alive, the soundtrack slaps, and the multiple camera views let you race your way. With 30+ tracks, insane variety, and a perfect balance of arcade fun and sim-like precision, this game thinks big—and delivers. The practice mode (with/without AI) is a godsend for honing skills.
Alpha Early access? Sure, but it already feels like a full experience close to a real racing simulation. If you love racing games that push you to the limit, Echo Drift is a must-play.

developer_response.body: Yep still early days as I have a lot of ideas not even touched on yet, thank you for the great review

reviews.review_description:
This delivers a smooth performance with a banging soundtrack.  The movement and controls feel intuitive for the most part, making it easy to get into the flow of gameplay without constantly fighting the mechanics, that said be very careful braking or you will spin out.  The graphics are different from the norm, blocky and I feel cartoony that said it does not detract from the game, there are several views, inside, outside and 1st person with some setting changes to suit each player.
There are some hours to be had in this game with campaign modes and career modes, the ability to customise the “car” and progress through the different tracks through winning races.

developer_response.body: Thank you, wanted to make the controls nice and easy thumbsticks or vr wheel or choice its then the driving you have to be good at :) plenty more to come for the campaign too more cars,Cups

reviews.review_description:
One for car enthusiasts, some great off road racing to have here, speed feels really accurate, hit a corner too fast and your race is done, love that this has a single player campaign, this is a pretty good racer that has that burnout or Flatout feel to i, with some great crashes which add to the tension and fun.
Fair play to moonshine, this is a top racer.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. Watched alot of different racer to get the right feel I wanted Flatout, Motorstorm, Stunt car racer (one for the oldies) and many many more

reviews.review_description: Thanks dav for fixing the game you do a wonderful job.  keep up the good work One of my favorite hover games on the quest

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving feedback :) lots more to come soon

reviews.review_description:
Echo Drift is one of those VR experiences that reminds you why virtual reality can be so compelling. From the moment you drop into its sleek, futuristic environments, the game leans heavily into immersion and for the most part, it absolutely delivers.

The standout feature here is movement. Instead of relying on traditional locomotion, Echo Drift uses fluid, physics-based drifting mechanics that feel intuitive after a short learning curve. Once it clicks, gliding through the environment becomes incredibly satisfying, almost meditative at times. It’s the kind of system that rewards practice, and you’ll likely find yourself improving quickly.

Visually, the game is clean and polished. The environments aren’t overly cluttered, but that works in its favour the minimalist aesthetic keeps performance smooth while still feeling atmospheric. Lighting and sound design also deserve credit for enhancing the sense of presence.

In terms of gameplay, Echo Drift focuses more on skill and flow than complex objectives. Depending on what you’re looking for, this can be either a strength or a limitation. It’s great for short sessions and replayability, but players seeking deep progression systems or narrative elements might find it a bit light.

Comfort wise, the drifting mechanic can take some getting used to, especially for players prone to motion sickness. Thankfully, there are comfort options available, but this is still a game best suited for those with moderate VR experience.

Overall, Echo Drift is a smooth, stylish VR title that excels in movement and immersion. It may not have the deepest content, but what it does, it does well and it’s a fantastic showcase of how satisfying VR locomotion can be.

developer_response.body: Thanks you for a great review, and dont worry on the content side plenty more to come

reviews.review_description: Echo Drift on Meta Quest is a fast, adrenaline-filled VR racing experience that really stands out to other racing games. The movement and drifting feel smooth and satisfying. The overall presentation does a solid job of immersing you in its world. I feel it may benefit from multiplayer which will take it to the next level.

developer_response.body: Multiplayer is planned and I have done a little test and all good, just working on the Lobby and that side, Would you want voice chat? or not needed

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of Rally but in vr
reviews.review_description: When you do a race with 6 other bots it is pure carnage. It's so satisfying to overtake people EXPECIALLY when you are in last place and make a last-ditch effort to make it up the ranks at a sharp corner

developer_response.body: Yeh making that 1st place on the last corner does feel good

reviews.review_description: You can use your sticks to drive or grab the wheel. Single players fun and challenging. Will update after multiplayer is released.

developer_response.body: Thanks. Work has already started on the next update: New Cup,New Class of cars then slowly testing multiplayer coming later
